scripts.build:fast: node ci/guards/green_entrypoint_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run engine:shim:check && node ci/guards/run_pipeline_contract_version_guard.mjs
scripts.dev:check: npm run ci && npm run db:schema
scripts.dev:fast: node ci/guards/green_entrypoint_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && npm run lint:fast && npm run test:unit
scripts.dev:panic: npm run repo:clean:hard && npm ci && npm run dev:fast
scripts.dev:prepush:smart: node ci/guards/green_entrypoint_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/prepush_smart.mjs
scripts.engine:contract:head: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('ENGINE_CONTRACT.md','utf8').split(/\r?\n/).slice(0,40).join('\n'); console.log(s);"
scripts.engine:hello: npm run build && node dist/src/run_pipeline_cli.js --in examples/hello_world.json
scripts.git:sync: git fetch --prune && git status -sb && (git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} >NUL 2>&1 && git pull --rebase || echo "no upstream; skipping pull")
scripts.lint: npm run lint:fast && npm run test:ci
scripts.lint:fast: node ci/guards/green_entrypoint_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/green_ci_parity_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/readme_validation_contract_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/green_contract_installer_sync_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/node_version_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/tag_version_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/repo_contract.mjs && node ci/guards/no_bom_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/no_crlf_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/diff_line_endings_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/no_mojibake_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ascii_only_ci_guards_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ban_set_content_utf8_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/guards_index_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/guards_entrypoint_coverage_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ban_direct_node_e_ref_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/lockfile_note_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ban_engine_status_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/ban_engine_src_imports_in_api_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/engine_contract_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/engine_exports_types_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/golden_manifest_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/golden_outputs_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/spine_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/sha256_guard.mjs && node ci/scripts/schema_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/evidence_seal_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/registry_schema_presence_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/registry_bundle_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/registry_law_guard.mjs
scripts.smoke: npm run lint && npm run engine:hello
scripts.test: node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1
scripts.test:ci: node test/ci_ban_engine_status_guard.test.mjs && node test/ci_ban_direct_node_e_ref_guard_node_runner_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_stable_stringify.test.mjs && node test/cli_runner_rendered_text.test.mjs && node test/phase4_rich_plan_minimum.test.mjs && node test/registry_exercise_entries.test.mjs && node test/phase6_requires_planned_items.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_passes.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_stimulus_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_equipment_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_stress_fk_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_equipment_scoped_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_tags_missing_negative.test.mjs && node test/ci_registry_law_guard_joint_tags_neutral_positive.test.mjs && node test/phase1_plate_only_collapse_negative.test.mjs && node test/cli_export_contract_docs.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_active_empty.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_active_canonical_no_upgrade.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_garbage_types.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_active_partial_garbage_array.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_inactive_garbage_types.test.mjs && node test/phase6_split_invariant_normalize_inactive_arrays.test.mjs && node test/ci_ban_set_content_utf8_guard_outfile_negative.test.mjs
scripts.test:unit: node ci/guards/green_entrypoint_guard.mjs && node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && npm run test:ci
scripts.green:ci: node ci/guards/clean_tree_guard.mjs && npm run guard:constraints && npm run guard:version && npm run green && npm run e2e:golden
scripts.engine:export: npm run build:fast && node dist/src/run_pipeline_cli.js --outdir out
